---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_esp32_order
alias: house_mesh_esp32_order
purchased_on: 2025-11-28
total_eur: 44
counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---
# ESP32 and relay board batch

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_esp32_order |
| alias          | house_mesh_esp32_order      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-11-28                  |
| total_eur      | 44                          |
| counterparty   | 深圳市海云电子                     |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Foundry                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | ESP32-C3 dev boards | 4   | 8        | 32       |
| 2 | relay modules       | 2   | 6        | 12       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL               |     |          | 44       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by OCRing all Foundry-related bills. Added YAML frontmatter to the three matching purchase records and then removed the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS before entering folders, inspected 99_system and used process-next-inbox-item, inbox-processing-v2-update, OCR, migration, and finance schema docs. Preserved original note bodies verbatim under new frontmatter and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Foundry. The canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/foundry.md established Foundry as the target entity. Searching finance records found three purchase notes whose visible data listed related_entity as Foundry, and each of those files contained all required bill-schema fields and line items needed for YAML frontmatter. Those three files were updated in place, preserving their original bodies, satisfying the OCR workflow and finance schema requirements.
